Description: The day of the simulation to start collecting data.
The day of the simulation to stop collecting data. If you want data collected on a specific day, enter that day plus 1.
Data will be collected for the nodes in this list. Empty list implies all nodes.
Minimum age in years of people to include in the report.
Maximum age in years of people to include in the report.
A Key:Value pair that the individual must have in order to be included. Empty string means to not include IPs in the selection criteria.
The name of the intervention that the person must have in order to be included. Empty string means to not include interventions in the selection criteria.

The minimum parasite density (asexual parasites per microliter of blood) that an infection must have to be included. A non-zero value filters out hepatocyte-stage infections and those with only gametocytes.
The number of days between sampling the population. Data is collected on days Start_Day, Start_Day + Sampling_Period, Start_Day + 2*Sampling_Period, and so on.

If true (1), an additional genome_ids column is appended to the CSV output containing EMOD's internal ID for the genome of each infection's parasite. This ID can be used to cross-reference genome data with other EMOD reports that include genome IDs.
